_comment: Grounded early-game progression checklist (Pallet -> Brock). Each subgoal is the CURRENT objective fed to the model until its done-condition (checkable from the RAM snapshot) fires, then the next becomes current. Map ids / item id 70 (OAK'S PARCEL) / badge bit 0x01 (Boulder) are all real. Extend past Brock as the fleet clears it.

subgoals.objective: Get your first Pokemon: in Oak's Lab, walk directly below one of the three Poke Balls and interact to take that starter.
subgoals.hint: The three balls are on the table in Oak's Lab (map 40). Stand on the tile just BELOW a ball (Charmander x6,y4 / Squirtle x7,y4 / Bulbasaur x8,y4), face up, and interact.

subgoals.objective: Go NORTH from Pallet Town up Route 1 to Viridian City, enter the Poke Mart, and talk to the clerk to receive OAK'S PARCEL.
subgoals.hint: Leave Pallet Town by the north edge -> Route 1 (map 12) -> Viridian City (map 1). The Poke Mart (map 42) is the blue-roof shop; talk to the CLERK behind the counter. You get OAK'S PARCEL.

subgoals.objective: Return SOUTH to Pallet Town and enter OAK'S LAB (not your own house), then talk to Prof. Oak to deliver OAK'S PARCEL. He gives you the POKEDEX.
subgoals.hint: Head SOUTH toward Pallet Town (map 0): from Viridian City go down Route 1 to Pallet.

hint_by_map.0: You are in Pallet Town. Oak's Lab is the building at the BOTTOM -- its entrance tile is (12,11). walk_to (12,11) to step inside (do NOT enter Red's house at (5,5)).
hint_by_map.40: You are INSIDE Oak's Lab. Prof. Oak is at the top-center. walk_to (5,4) to stand directly below him, then INTERACT (face up). Keep going -- the dialog advances and he hands over the POKEDEX; OAK'S PARCEL leaves your bag when done. Do NOT walk to (12,11) or the exit -- go UP to (5,4).

subgoals.objective: With the POKEDEX, go north again through Viridian City and take the NORTH exit to Route 2 (the man who was blocking the way is gone).
subgoals.hint: From Pallet -> Route 1 -> Viridian City (map 1). Head to the TOP (north) of Viridian City and step off the north edge into Route 2 (map 13).

subgoals.objective: Travel north through Route 2 into VIRIDIAN FOREST, then out its north gate to Pewter City. Battle the Bug Catchers on the way to level up (aim for level 12-14 before Brock).
subgoals.hint: Route 2 (map 13) -> Viridian Forest (map 51) via its south gate (map 50) -> north gate (map 47) -> Pewter City (map 2). Fight trainers/wild Pokemon in the forest to gain levels; heal at the Pewter Poke Center (map 58) if low.

subgoals.objective: Enter PEWTER GYM and defeat Brock to win the BOULDER BADGE.
subgoals.hint: Pewter Gym is map 54 (west side of Pewter City). Brock has GEODUDE L12 and ONIX L14, both Rock/Ground. Use WATER or GRASS moves if you have them (super-effective); a Squirtle/Bulbasaur wins easily. With Charmander, rely on repeated physical hits and heal as needed -- avoid Fire/Normal specials. Beating Brock gives Badge bit 0x01.
